message:
feat(coordinator): implement score-based work assignment (ntm-o1fq)

Add ScoreAndSelectAssignments function for intelligent agent-task matching
using multi-factor scoring. The algorithm considers:

- Agent type compatibility: Claude for complex work (epics, features),
  Codex for quick fixes (chores, simple bugs), Gemini balanced
- Critical path weighting: Bonus for high PageRank, blocker ratio, and
  time-to-impact from bv triage metrics
- File overlap penalty: Discourages overloading agents with many reservations
- Context budget awareness: Penalizes agents near context window limits

Key components:
- ScoreConfig: Configurable scoring behavior with sensible defaults
- ScoreAndSelectAssignments: Main entry point for optimal matching
- estimateTaskComplexity: Heuristic based on type, priority, unblocks
- Comprehensive test coverage for all scoring functions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
